title: zornia pratensis
intro: Zornia pratensis, also known as buttonweed or buttonweed zornia, is a perennial herb native to the Americas and parts of Asia. It is a member of the Fabaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Zornia pratensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those interested in natural medicine.
